title: hedysarum boreale subsp. dasycarpum
intro: Hedysarum boreale subsp. dasycarpum, also known as the Canadian sarsaparilla or sarsaparilla, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hedysarum boreale subsp. dasycarpum include its ability to treat various health issues such as arthritis, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. It is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and salves.
